title: Paper notes: RT-1 — Robotics Transformer for Real-World Control at Scale
summary: Quick notes on RT-1: a transformer policy that takes a short image history plus a natural-language instruction and outputs 11-dimensional robot actions, trained by imitation on 130K teleop demonstrations.

title: A self-contained proof of universal approximation
summary: An elementary proof of the universal approximation theorem for single-hidden-layer networks, built from the Fejér theorem and Stone–Weierstrass instead of Hahn–Banach.

title: Welcome to the blog
summary: Why I'm starting this blog and what I'll be writing about — LLMs, mathematics, and the strange middle they make together.
